memoryArtifacts.headline: History of George Seton (1508 - 1549)
memoryArtifacts.description:
George Seton IV, 6th Lord Seton (died 1549) was a Lord of the Parliament of Scotland.

He was the son of Janet Hepburn, daughter of Patrick Hepburn, 1st Earl of Bothwell. His father, the 5th Lord Seto …

zh.lifeSummary: 當George Seton於1507年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾格林頓時，他的父親George Seton26歲，母親Lady Jane Janet Hepburn25歲。他於1527年4月10日與Elizabeth Hay在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年7月17日在蘇格蘭費伏洛斯享年42歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏洛斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Seton于1507年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾艾格林頓时，他的父亲George Seton26岁，母亲Lady Jane Janet Hepburn25岁。他于1527年4月10日与Elizabeth Hay在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1549年7月17日在苏格兰費伏洛斯享年42岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏洛斯。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When George Seton was born in 1507, in Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, George Seton, was 26 and his mother, Lady Jane Janet Hepburn, was 25. He married Elizabeth Hay on 10 April 1527, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 17 July 1549, in Culross, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 42, and was buried in Culross, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Seton est né en 1507, à Eglinton, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, George Seton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Janet Hepburn, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hay le 10 avril 1527, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1549, à Culross, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Culross, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Seton 1507 in Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Seton 26 und seine Mutter Lady Jane Janet Hepburn 25. Er hat am 10. April 1527 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Elizabeth Hay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Juli 1549 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Culross, Fife, Scotland und wurde in Culross, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Seton è nato il nel 1507 nel Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, George Seton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jane Janet Hepburn, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hay il 10 aprile 1527, nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 luglio 1549, nel Culross, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Culross, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: George Setonが1507年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエグリントンで生まれた時，父George Setonは26歳，母Lady Jane Janet Hepburnは25歳であった。1527年4月10日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンでElizabeth Hayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1549年7月17日にスコットランドフィフクウルロスで42歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフクウルロスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Seton(이)가 1507년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 그린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Seton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Janet Hepburn(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1527년 4월 10일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 Elizabeth Hay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 7월 17일 스컷랜드 피프 컬로스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 컬로스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Seton nasceu em 1507, em Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, George Seton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Janet Hepburn, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hay em 10 de abril de 1527, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1549, em Culross, Fife, Scotland, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Culross, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Seton родился в 1507 г. в местности эглинтон, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени George Seton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Janet Hepburn, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hay 10 апреля 1527 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 июля 1549 г. в местности кулросс, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности кулросс, фиф, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Seton nació en 1507, en Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, George Seton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Janet Hepburn, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hay el 10 de abril de 1527, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de julio de 1549, en Culross, Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Culross, Fife, Scotland.
